kits.name: Builder Kit
kits.description: Flow-backed shaping, planning, build, verification, merge readiness, pull request readiness, and learning workflows.

kits.name: Knowledge Kit
kits.description: Store contract with record types (raw/compiled/concept), mutation operations with required provenance, default markdown+frontmatter+wikilink+graph-index adapter, and a parameterized contract test suite.

kits.name: Release Evidence Kit
kits.description: Minimal flows-only kit for proving agentless gate evaluation over surface claims in CI. One gate expects a trusted release.evidence claim.

kits.name: Veritas Governance Kit
kits.description: Agentless kit that gates a real `veritas readiness` verdict as a trust.bundle software-readiness-verdict claim. Wraps @kontourai/veritas via CLI + a kit-local adapter; does not reimplement standards evaluation.
